sensitivity: 92.7% [95% CI: 87.4-96.2] for pneumothorax; 93.3% [95% CI: 88.1-96.4] for pleural effusion
specificity: 97.3% [95% CI: 93.4-99.1] for pneumothorax; 90.0% [95% CI: 84.1-94.1] for pleural effusion
intended_use: SmartChest is a radiological computer assisted triage and notification software that analyzes frontal chest X-ray images (Postero-Anterior (PA) or Antero-Posterior (AP)) of transitional adolescents (1
intended_use_full: SmartChest is a radiological computer assisted triage and notification software that analyzes frontal chest X-ray images (Postero-Anterior (PA) or Antero-Posterior (AP)) of transitional adolescents (18 - 21 yo but treated like adults) and adults (≥22 yo) for the presence of suspected pleural effusion and/or pneumothorax. SmartChest uses an artificial intelligence algorithm to analyze the images for features suggestive of critical findings and provides case-level output available to a PACS (or other DICOM storage platforms) for worklist prioritization.
ground_truth: Reference standard established by three ABR-certified radiologists with minimum 5 years cardiothoracic radiology experience; two radiologists independently interpreted each case, third radiologist reviewed disagreements, final determination by majority consensus
other_metrics: Mean execution time: 2.322 ± 0.267 seconds on local server and 28.542 ± 8.254 seconds on cloud server for pneumothorax; 2.288 ± 0.165 seconds on local server and 28.257 ± 7.226 seconds on cloud server for pleural effusion
